channel.title: Security on Memo
channel.description: Recent content in Security on Memo

item.title: Public Key Cryptography
item.description: Type of keys # RSA https://ocw.kyoto-u.ac.jp/ja/graduate-school-of-informatics-jp/06/video02/08 http://herb.h.kobe-u.ac.jp/RSA.html https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc8017 DSA https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6605 ECDSA https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6979 EdDSA https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc8032 SSH key # Comparing SSH Keys - RSA, DSA, ECDSA, or EdDSA? SSHの公開鍵暗号には「RSA」「DSA」「ECDSA」「EdDSA」のどれを使えばよいのか？ Key generation # RSA: ssh-keygen -t rsa -b 4096 ECDSA: ssh-keygen -t ecdsa -b 521 EdDSA: ssh-keygen -t ed25519

item.title: GPG Key
item.description: GPG (GNU Privacy Key) List keys Add GPG key Remove GPG key Key servers List keys # List public gpg keys: gpg --list-keys List secret gpg keys: gpg --list-secret-keys Add GPG key # Receive keys: gpg --keyserver keys.gnupg.net --recv-keys [key id] Remove GPG key # Remove keys: gpg --delete-keys [key id] Key servers # keys.openpgp.org keys.
